Meraki AI Labs is a Chennai-based technology consulting and transformation company helping businesses accelerate their digital journey through Artificial Intelligence, Industrial Automation, Robotics, IIoT, and Full Stack Technologies — bridging emerging technologies with real-world business outcomes.

Our Programs

Training & Internship Programs

Meraki AI Labs is committed to nurturing the next generation of technology professionals through industry-focused, hands-on training and internship programs. Participants gain practical exposure through real-world projects, mentorship from industry experts, and opportunities to work on live enterprise solutions.

Expert Mentorship
Guided by active industry professionals with 5–15 years of real-world experience.
Live Projects
Work on real enterprise solutions and build a portfolio that stands out.
Certification
Industry-recognised completion certificate and LinkedIn recommendation.
Placement Support
Resume building, mock interviews and referrals with 50+ hiring partners.
Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
Python, supervised & unsupervised learning, deep learning, NLP, computer vision and real-world AI model deployment on enterprise datasets.
PythonMLDeep LearningNLP
⏱ 10–12 weeks
Generative AI, LLMs & AI Agents
Large Language Models, Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, AI Agents, Agentic AI workflows, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
GenAILLMsRAGMCP
⏱ 8–10 weeks
Robotics & Industrial IoT
Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ROS, sensors, actuators, autonomous robotic systems, IIoT protocols, SCADA, PLCs, edge computing and smart factory automation.
RoboticsIIoTROSPLC
⏱ 8–12 weeks
Robotic Process Automation (RPA)
Automate business processes across finance, HR, operations and supply chain using leading RPA tools. Hands-on bot development with real enterprise workflows.
RPAAutomationBots
⏱ 6–8 weeks
Full Stack Development
React, Node.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, GraphQL, cloud deployment and building production-ready web and mobile applications with modern DevOps practices.
ReactNode.jsMongoDBAPIs
⏱ 10–12 weeks
Cloud Technologies & DevOps
AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, monitoring and cloud architecture best practices for scalable enterprise systems.
AWSDockerKubernetesCI/CD
⏱ 8–10 weeks
Python Programming
Comprehensive Python from fundamentals to advanced concepts — data structures, OOP, file handling, APIs, automation scripting and data processing libraries.
PythonOOPPandasNumPy
⏱ 6–8 weeks
Data Analytics & Visualisation
Python, Pandas, NumPy, Power BI, Tableau and SQL — turning raw business data into actionable insights through statistical analysis and compelling dashboards.
Power BITableauSQLPandas
⏱ 6–8 weeks
Batches starting every month · Online & Offline modes available
About Us

About Meraki AI Labs

We partner with startups, SMEs, and enterprises to solve complex business challenges by leveraging Artificial Intelligence, Industrial Automation, Robotics, Industrial IoT, and Full Stack Technologies. Our mission is to bridge the gap between emerging technologies and real-world business outcomes — enabling organizations to become smarter, more efficient, and future-ready.

AI & Agentic Systems

We design intelligent AI Agents that automate workflows, decision-making, customer interactions and enterprise operations using Generative & Agentic AI.

Robotics & Industrial IoT

We build robotics solutions combining AI, machine vision, sensors and automation to improve industrial productivity, safety and operational efficiency.

Innovation & R&D

Our R&D focuses on AI, Agentic Systems, Robotics, Computer Vision, Industrial Automation and next-generation enterprise technologies.

Training & Internships

Industry-focused programs in AI/ML, GenAI, RAG, MCP, Robotics, IIoT, RPA and Full Stack — nurturing future-ready tech professionals.

Services

Our Core Expertise

End-to-end consulting, development, implementation and training services across AI, Automation, Robotics and Digital Transformation.

Technology Consulting & Digital Transformation
We help organizations modernize legacy systems and implement scalable technology solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and competitive advantage.
Industry Automation
Intelligent automation streamlining business operations and manufacturing processes, reducing manual effort and improving operational excellence.
AI Agent Development
Intelligent AI Agents automating workflows, decision-making, customer interactions and enterprise operations using Generative & Agentic AI.
Robotics & Intelligent Systems
Robotics solutions combining AI, machine vision, sensors and automation to improve industrial productivity, safety, and operational efficiency.
Industrial IoT (IIoT)
Connected ecosystems enabling real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, asset tracking and data-driven decision-making through IIoT platforms.
Robotic Process Automation (RPA)
Automate repetitive business processes across finance, HR, operations and supply chain — delivering significant cost and time savings.
Product Development
From concept to commercialization — innovative tech products, SaaS platforms, AI-powered applications and enterprise solutions tailored to market needs.
Full Stack Development
Modern web and mobile apps using scalable architectures, cloud-native technologies, APIs and microservices — built for performance and scale.
Ready to start your journey?
Join 500+ students who have already transformed their careers.

AI Reports Assistant
Ask anything about your portal data — enquiries, enrollments, batches, expenses
👋 Hi! I'm your Meraki Ai Labs data assistant. I can answer questions about your portal data in real time.

Try asking things like:
How many enquiries do we have? Which program has the most enrollments? What is the total revenue collected? List all active batches Show pending fee summary What is the conversion rate?
Answers are generated from your live portal data · Press Enter to send

Data Backup & Restore
Your data is stored in this browser's localStorage. When you download a new version of the portal, click Export Backup first, then open the new file and use Import Backup to restore all your records instantly.
Export Backup
Download all data as JSON
Import Backup
Restore data from a JSON file
Select a backup file to preview before restoring.
